scripts.check:backend: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=high
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high
scripts.check: npm run check:skills && npm run check:load && npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:root
